title: Sustainable Jobs Stream - Canadian Apprenticeship Strategy - Union Training and Innovation Program - How to apply - Canada.ca
content:
Application period: Closed on September 5, 2024 at 3:00 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT)
- When you'll get a funding decision
Use your Grants and Contributions Online Services (GCOS) account to apply:
- Answer all the questions directly in the application The questions in the online form are not numbered, but they are in the same order as the How to answer the application questions section
- The questions in the online form are not numbered, but they are in the same order as the How to answer the application questions section
- Download and fill the Budget Detail Template form Budget Detail Template Set A EMP5569 ( PDF , 839 KB )
Budget Detail Template Set A EMP5569 ( PDF , 839 KB )
- Upload your Budget Detail Template and other supporting documents, listed in the section Prepare your documents , in the GCOS application
If you don't have a GCOS account, create one as soon as possible. You can submit your application as soon as you complete your GCOS user and organization profile. Once your GCOS user and organization profile are completed, you can immediately submit your application. Once your application is submitted, you must finalize your GCOS account as soon as possible to ensure you are fully registered and benefit from all the advantages.
GCOS is an online platform where users can create an account for their organization. This allows users to submit funding applications online to Employment and Social Development Canada (ESDC). Once you create your account, it allows you to:
- track the status of your application
- sign an agreement if your application is approved for funding
- manage active projects
- review past projects submitted through your GCOS account
Sign in or register for GCOS Find out more about the GCOS account registration process.

### Confirmation of receipt
If you submit your application through GCOS, you will receive an acknowledgment immediately and a tracking number.
While we recommend submitting your application through GCOS, you can also apply using one of the following options:
To apply by email or mail, download and complete the application and budget forms.
Application for Funding EMP5523 ( PDF , 801 KB)
Budget Detail Template Set A EMP5569 ( PDF , 839 KB )
Email your application package to edsc.dgop.sca-cas.pob.esdc@servicecanada.gc.ca by 3:00 pm, Eastern Daylight Time (EDT) September 5, 2024.
You will receive an automatic confirmation of receipt by email.
Your application must be postmarked on or before 3:00 pm EDT by September 5, 2024. You can mail your application to the following address:
Union Training and Innovation Program - Sustainable Jobs Stream Coordination Unit Mailstop 402 National Grants & Contributions Delivery Centre, ESDC Phase IV, 4th Floor 140 Promenade du Portage Gatineau QC  K1A 0J9
If you submit your application by mail, you will receive an acknowledgment by email within 14 days of the closing date of the call for proposals. You will receive an acknowledgment to the email address provided in your application. Note additional administrative delays might apply.
Our application form uses PDF form technology. You must have a PDF reader installed to use the form correctly. There are several readers available on the Internet for free that support our form:
- Adobe Reader (you must use a version of Adobe Reader 8 or higher, for example Adobe Acrobat DC Reader)
If you do not use the recommended readers (Adobe Acrobat 8 or higher or Foxit Reader), ESDC may receive a blank application from you.
- Make sure that you have Adobe Acrobat Reader 8 or higher or Foxit Reader installed on your system.
- Select the application form
- When prompted to open or save the form, select the down arrow on the "Save" button, and select "Save as".
- Select your folder location and save (file type must be PDF).
- Reopen the form from your computer: select the "Open with" option choose option to open with either Adobe Acrobat Reader or Foxit
- select the "Open with" option
- choose option to open with either Adobe Acrobat Reader or Foxit
- Make sure that the form opens in one of the Reader Softwares (Adobe or Foxit), by looking at the top of your screen. For example, you should see: ESDC-EMP XXXX.pdf (SECURED) - Adobe Acrobat Reader DC ESDC-EMP XXXX.pdf (SECURED) - Foxit PhantomPDF
- ESDC-EMP XXXX.pdf (SECURED) - Adobe Acrobat Reader DC
- ESDC-EMP XXXX.pdf (SECURED) - Foxit PhantomPDF
- Begin inputting and save your information.
- Before submitting your application make sure that the application form is completed, and all information has saved properly.
To move from one field to the next on the form, hit "Tab". This ensures that you do not accidently skip over any fields.
Some sections of the form perform calculations based on the amounts you enter and will automatically calculate totals in the appropriate fields. You are responsible for the completeness and accuracy of any information submitted. Please double-check all data you enter.

### Only submit 1 application per trade
Submit only one copy of your application to ESDC. Submitting multiple copies of the same application or submitting the same application by using various methods will cause longer processing times for your application.
Note : Applicants may submit more than 1 proposal. ESDC may consider funding other organizations from various locations before funding the same organization more than once.

## When you'll get a funding decision
We expect to make funding decisions in winter 2025.
You should not start your project until you hear from us.
If you apply through GCOS, you will be able to track the status of your application throughout the process.
Not all submitted applications will be selected for funding, as funding is limited. Please note that decisions are final and there is no appeal process.
Learn more about what to expect after you apply for a contribution .
- Previous: Prepare to apply

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
